Offset lanes for buses and right turns

A photograph of a city street scene on 125th Street. The street is paved with a dark asphalt lane for cars and a red-painted lane for buses and right-turning cars. A green arrow points to a car parked at the curb. Another green arrow points to the red-painted lane. People are standing on the sidewalk, and a bus is visible in the distance. Storefronts and buildings are visible in the background.

proposed_relations.description: Updated parking regulations in CB10 area for M60 SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Parking Regulations Changes in CB10

The map illustrates the CB10 area with the following parking regulation changes: Potential Conversion to Alternate-Side Parking: Indicated by orange horizontal bars on W 124 St, W 125 St, W 126 St, and E 126 St. New Metered Parking on Avenues: Indicated by green vertical bars on Fred Douglass Bl, Adam C Powell Bl, and 5 Av. New Commercial Loading Zone: Indicated by red truck icons on St Nicholas Av, W 125 St, and E 125 St.
